page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Tools for processing UMI RNA-tag data
page_metadata.biotools__summary: A package that provides tools for estimating expression in RNA-Seq data which performs sequencing of end tags of transcript, and incorporate molecular tags to correct for amplification bias.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A package that provides tools for estimating expression in RNA-Seq data which performs sequencing of end tags of transcript, and incorporate molecular tags to correct for amplification bias.
